lesson.menu_desc: Present Simple Questions and Work Vocabulary -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- My Job at the Company -- Present Simple Questions and Work Vocabulary
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Dienane Brandão de Mesquita | Aula 7 -- My Job at the Company

listenings.text: Hello, let me tell you about my job. I work at a big company in Altamira. I am a manager in the HR department. HR means human resources. Every day, I talk with the employees and I help my coworkers. I answer their questions about work, time, and salary. I like my job because I help people. My company is a good place to work, and my team is great.

Good morning, everyone. Let me tell you about our team. Our company has many departments. I am the manager of the Sales department. We have ten employees and three coworkers from other cities. Every Monday, we talk about our work and our goals. The company pays a good salary, and the people here are friendly. I am happy to work with this team.

extra_audio.text: Dienane arrives at the office in the morning. She talks with her coworkers about the day. She helps the employees with their questions. She has a meeting with her manager. She finishes her work and goes home.
